en: I'm hurtin' baby, I'm broken down I need your lovin', lovin' I need it now
When I'm without you, I'm somethin' weak You got me beggin', beggin', I'm on my knees
I don't wanna be needin' your love I just wanna be deep in your love
And it's killin' me when you're away, oh baby
Cause I really don't care where you are, I just wanna be there where you are
And I gotta get one little taste, of your sugar
I need you, I can't live without you, don't hurt me
